name: markdown-content-renderer
description: Stateless React Markdown renderer with GitHub-Flavored Markdown (tables, task lists, strikethrough, autolinks).
postInstall: 1. Install deps: npm install react-markdown@^9.0.1 remark-gfm@^4.0.0
3. For user-generated content, also install rehype-sanitize and add it to rehypePlugins
